allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add auto-optimize hook and exploration agents

- Add post-edit-optimize.sh hook that prompts code optimization after
  Edit/Write operations on source files
- Add code-explorer agent for codebase exploration with summary output
- Add docs-explorer agent for documentation search via Context7 and web
- Add /prdx:config hooks command for plugin consumers to enable hooks
- Bump version to 0.7.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
